description:
A Sustainability Specialist at a commercial facility is evaluating the installation of a 500 kW stationary natural gas fuel cell to provide continuous baseload power. Model this system using the PySAM.Fuelcell module with FuelCellCommercial defaults, ensuring the total capacity is exactly 500 kW. Run an annual simulation to determine the annual AC energy generation, annual fuel usage, and the capacity factor percentage. Save the Python script to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/fuel_cell_model.py and the results to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/fuel_cell_results.json using this structure:

{
  "total_capacity_kw": 500,
  "number_of_units": <integer>,
  "unit_max_power_kw": <float>,
  "annual_energy_kwh": <float>,
  "annual_fuel_usage": <float>,
  "capacity_factor_pct": <float>
}
